nasb.text: So I congratulated the dead who are already dead more than the living who are still living.

esv.text: And I thought the dead who are already dead more fortunate than the living who are still alive.

cnv.text: 我讚歎那已死的人，勝過那還活著的人。

ccb.text: 我为那已死的人庆幸，因为他们比活着的人幸福。

csbs.text: 所以我感叹，那些早已死去的死人，胜过那些还活着的活人；
